subcodes.first_line: O Ghaffári! Grieve thou not at this separation, for thou art among them that have remained faithful to the Covenant. We love thee even as thou lovest Us, and Our love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: غفاری لا تحزن من الفراق انت ممن وفیت المیثاق انا نحبک کما تحبنا و حبنا
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude
